Grade 3 — Unit Plan

Title: The Market and the Kitchen

This unit is designed for Grade 3 (terza) students. The focus is everyday
vocabulary for shopping and cooking — fruit, vegetables, prices, and simple
recipes. Students role-play buying food at a market and describing a recipe
step by step.

CEFR target: designed to target A2 across listening and speaking.

Materials: picture flashcards, a class recipe book, and play-money for the
market role-play.
